titles.title: What Could You Do with Me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You took a stone to kill a giant You took a staff to part the sea And only you could do so much with ordinary things You took a slave to tame a lion You took a rock to make a stream And only, you could would choose a shepherd to be a king, so

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: i don't have to be the strongest You are perfect in my weakness If You can move a mountain With faith like a grain of mustard seed i wonder what you could do with me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're the God of all creation You're the King above all kings But only you, could choose a rugged cross to rescue me You're the healer of the broken, By faith I still believe You took on my flesh, you conquered death Lord you are my victory, cause

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Open my eyes Show me who I could be Lord help me see that
